sourceMovie.title: Pokémon the Movie: The Power of Us
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto Pokémon the Movie: The Power of Us (2018) as a animation theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The animation and family blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Pokémon the Movie: I Choose You!
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Pokémon the Movie: The Power of Us clicked for you, Pokémon the Movie: I Choose You! (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and family, with earned warmth without mush. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Pokémon the Movie: The Power of Us?
faq.answer: Try Pokémon the Movie: I Choose You!, Pokémon: Lucario and the Mystery of Mew, Pokémon: Destiny Deoxys—each shares DNA with Pokémon the Movie: The Power of Us while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Pokémon the Movie: The Power of Us?
faq.answer: Pokémon the Movie: The Power of Us (2018) is best described as Animation, Family, Adventure, Fantasy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Pokémon the Movie: The Power of Us part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Pokémon (Alternate Continuity) Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
